# ReelBot

ReelBot is an AI movie recommendation companion built to help people decide what to watch faster.

Main pages:
- / — homepage with vibe-based movie picking
- /now-playing — movies in theaters now
- /trending — trending movie feed
- /coming-soon — upcoming movie releases
- /browse — browse by genre, mood, runtime, and release state
- /movies/:id/:slug — movie detail pages with AI guidance and where-to-watch info
- /how-reelbot-works — explains the product and recommendation flow

What ReelBot does:
- AI movie picks based on vibe prompts
- spoiler-light quick takes
- viewer split summaries
- next-watch recommendations
- TMDB-powered movie discovery with AI ranking

How it works:
- TMDB provides movie metadata, feeds, posters, and release information
- ReelBot filters weak low-signal titles
- OpenAI helps rank strong candidate movies and explain why a movie fits
- save / seen / skip interactions shape future picks in the browser

Primary data sources:
- TMDB
- OpenAI
